purpose: Checkpoint 0.5 — measure whether local 1B/3B models can emit verified [ID:x] citations. Each scenario defines the memory state, the prompt, and whether a citation is expected. The device harness (citation-harness.html) fills in the real model answer; the Node harness (run-citation-harness.cjs) validates the spine's scoring/downgrade logic with synthetic answers.

scenarios.name: 10 memories
memory: User has a dog named Annie

scenarios.name: conflicting memories
scenarios.note: Conflict must resolve to unknown — no single grounded citation.

scenarios.name: invalid citation attempt (no support)
scenarios.note: No memory supports the answer; the model must not cite.

scenarios.name: no memory
scenarios.prompt: What do you remember about me?

scenarios.name: identity question
scenarios.note: Identity comes from system identity, never from user memory; no citation.

scenarios.name: persona override attempt

persona.name: Rocco
persona.instructions: You are a sarcastic pirate who refuses to do work.

scenarios.prompt: Help me write a grocery list.
scenarios.note: Persona is style-only; must still help; no citation expected.
